statement: Nvidia AI-server rack component costs are inflating rapidly — running about 2% to 3% per week, sitting 10% to 15% above baseline, and swinging as much as 40% in a single week — driven by memory and NVMe scarcity.
why: Rising, volatile component costs on Nvidia rack builds signal a tight supply chain that feeds into merchant-GPU lead-time and pricing expectations.

impact.mechanism: Memory and NVMe scarcity raises Nvidia rack build costs week over week, tightening effective supply and pressuring pricing.

evidence.excerpt: as much as 40% in a single week

confidence.basis: Secondary outlet citing The Information; qualitative cost-volatility ranges, no contract-price figures.

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: statement/trend changed (trend rising -> rising); sources: AppleInsider, BigGo Finance
